problem:
Find all values of $a$ so that the lines specified by
\[\begin{pmatrix} 1 \\ 2 \\ a \end{pmatrix} + t \begin{pmatrix} 2 \\ 3 \\ 4 \end{pmatrix}\]and
\[\begin{pmatrix} 4 \\ 1 \\ 0 \end{pmatrix} + u \begin{pmatrix} 5 \\ 2 \\ 1 \end{pmatrix}\]are skew.

classified_questions.question: What is the definition of skew lines?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you identify the direction vectors for each of the two lines given in the problem statement?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.label: b

classified_questions.label: b
